About me

Hi I'm Oliver I am 22 years old, I am interested in computers, programming, and computer games.

Wijkmanska/Wenströmska High School

I have studied in Java 1 and 2, computer and network technology, web server programming 1 and web development 1. I learned Cisco Packet tracer, CSS, HTML, PHP, SQL lite and java.

2019-2021

Education in FPGA programming, however most of my education was C programming. Finished only C programming course due to personal reasons and was happy with my last project in the course.
